STORYGALLERYROADMAPTEAM
    0 SOL

WHAT IS HONG KONG STREET CLUB?

HKSC ( Hong Kong Street Club ) is a Hong Kong based NFT Project. 3,888 of Hong Kong scenes are randomly generated on Solana blockchain. And this is the first batch of HKSC NFT Collection featuring with some familiar Hong Kong location. Please stay tuned.

JOIN OUR DISCORD
100+

TRAITS

400+

STREETS

TBC

SOL

3,888

SUPPLY

Another PFP Project?
Nah, to record & relate

01

Unlike the other PFP project, you can create your own profile picture with our PFP Maker. Is a game changing project that you can design your own character looks with our background NFT.

02

The project that you can relate the most. Not just preservation of historical heritage but the places you always see everydays.

03

Making good use of blockchain technology and the InterPlanetary File System. We could record some of Hong Kong's memorable items and places on the blockchain.

GALLERY

What special with our design?

HKSC had been design and develope for over a year. Over hundred of unique traits are applied in the design. And more than 400 street name you can find on our design. You will see familiar Hong Kong street objects in eight separate layers.

CHECK RARITY

*Coming Soon

ROADMAP

Our vision is to maintain a long-term project to develope a complete system of "Create to Earn". Not only those creators are the one being rewarded. Our NFT owners will benefits from our exclusive Profile Picture Maker.
* Deprecated, Demo will be release soon!

03 Tokenomics

Q4 2023

HKSC Token will be dropped to those early adopters who support this NFT collection. Tokens can be used as currency to buy cosmetic items in the profile picture maker. And more functionality will be added in the future.

04 Reward Program

Q1 2024

To encourage our community members’ contribution, HKSC will have a reward program for our members. User-generated content like fan art, design, and constructive feedback will be rewarded with HKSC tokens or sharing of royalties.

01 Discord Verification / DAO

Q2 2023

Once the minting has been finished, we will have a verification system in our Discord. Users are able to verify their owner identity by connecting to their wallets. Roles and permission will be given to users who had verified.

02 Profile Picture Maker

Q2 2023

The Profile Picture Maker Demo will be online and allow users to create their own profile pictures. More cosmetic items will be available for future updates.

03 Tokenomics

Q4 2023

HKSC Token will be dropped to those early adopters who support this NFT collection. Tokens can be used as currency to buy cosmetic items in the profile picture maker. And more functionality will be added in the future.

04 Reward Program

Q1 2024

To encourage our community members’ contribution, HKSC will have a reward program for our members. User-generated content like fan art, design, and constructive feedback will be rewarded with HKSC tokens or sharing of royalties.

01 Discord Verification / DAO

Q2 2023

Once the minting has been finished, we will have a verification system in our Discord. Users are able to verify their owner identity by connecting to their wallets. Roles and permission will be given to users who had verified.

02 Profile Picture Maker

Q2 2023

The Profile Picture Maker Demo will be online and allow users to create their own profile pictures. More cosmetic items will be available for future updates.

03 Tokenomics

Q4 2023

HKSC Token will be dropped to those early adopters who support this NFT collection. Tokens can be used as currency to buy cosmetic items in the profile picture maker. And more functionality will be added in the future.

04 Reward Program

Q1 2024

To encourage our community members’ contribution, HKSC will have a reward program for our members. User-generated content like fan art, design, and constructive feedback will be rewarded with HKSC tokens or sharing of royalties.

SUPPORT

EXTRA

Feel free to contact us for collaboration and sharing us with your idea. To know more about our future plan of Profile Picture Maker, Tokenomics and our HKSC eco-system, checkout our White Paper.

Contact UsLitepaper

01 Where can I mint a Hong Kong Street Club NFT?

hksc.io is the only official website to mint Hong Kong Street Club NFT.

02 What wallet can I use for minting?

As HKSC is launched on Solana network, we will highly recommend using Phantom wallet to mint HKSC NFT.

03 What is the privilege of joining HKSC?

Owning an HKSC NFT is eligible to join HKSC DAO. Voting and other benefits will be granted after verification of the Discord role. To know more information, please check on our documentation.

04 Who is the team behind HKSC?

HKSC is an indie team based in Hong Kong. Our team is mainly composed of passionate designers. We share a common vision of NFT and a love of Hong Kong culture. And this is how HKSC come up.

05 I want to have a collaboration, how can I contact your team?

We welcome all different kinds of collaboration, you can use the form in the contact us section and we will contact you as soon as possible!
